description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 1, 2026 (Reiwa 8, Wednesday), we held an oath-taking ceremony for 15 newly hired employees. They have joined Hanno City's staff with hope in their hearts.

With these new employees alongside all our current staff, we will continue working with full effort to realize our vision for the future: "Forest Culture City Hanno—where people, nature, and tomorrow connect; a place of virtuous cycles where people want to live forever."

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13425.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Oath-taking ceremony for Hanno City's new employees, fiscal year 2026 (Reiwa 8)
